---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

![](images/WhatsApp%20Image%202026-02-18%20at%2021.02.44.jpeg){fig-align="left" width="181"}

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Middle East Technical University, Turkey, 2017 - 2024.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm Mitas Industry Inc. Position Junior SAS Specialist, year 2025-Ongoing

2.  Firm Mitas Bolt Inc., position BI and Data Specialist, year 2023-2025

## Internships

1.  Firm Petlas, position Purchasing Intern, year 2023

2.  Firm Mitas Bolt Inc, position Manufacturing Intern, year 2022

# Competencies

SQL,Excel VBA,Power BI,R, Quarto, Git, Python
